name: USS PC-817 (PC-817)
events: 2 Jul 1945 USS Seahorse (T/Cdr. H.H. Greer, Jr., USN) and USS Perch (T/Lt.Cdr. C.D. McCall, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Darby (Lt.Cdr. M.W. Martin, USNR) and USS PC-817 (Lt. H.R. Stern, Jr., USNR).
5 Jul 1945 During 5/6 July 1945, USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS J. Douglas Blackwood (Lt.Cdr. J.L. Johnston, USNR).
On the 6th, USS PC-817 (Lt. H.R. Stern, Jr., USNR) also joined the exercises.
